scenarios.rationale: RHEL 7 is EOL. Upgrade to RHEL 8/9 is required. AWS deployment facilitates OS upgrade with reduced downtime.
App already runs on Linux (RHEL 7). OS upgrade to current RHEL version is needed, but Linux OS is already in use.
AWS deployment allows migration to Graviton (ARM) instances for cost savings. Requires Java 11 → Java 21 upgrade and testing.
WebSphere 7.0 is critically EOL (2015). Replace with modern application server (WildFly, Spring Boot embedded, or Jakarta EE).
CRMApp-002 is already deployed on AWS. Cloud deployment objective is fulfilled.
Currently not containerized despite AWS deployment. Containerization would improve portability and enable Kubernetes orchestration.
Architecture is marked 'unknown' for this 3rd-party CRM. Refactoring scope depends on vendor-provided customization boundaries.
Amazon RDS MySQL is a managed service — AWS handles version upgrades automatically.
Amazon RDS MySQL is already a managed database service.
Amazon RDS MySQL can run on Graviton (ARM) instances. Migration from x86 RDS to Graviton RDS yields cost savings.
Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 could replace RDS MySQL for variable CRM workloads, reducing cost during off-peak periods.
Amazon RDS MySQL is already managed and cost-effective. PostgreSQL switch would not provide meaningful benefit for this 3rd-party CRM.
